text:
(In reply to Guangyuan Yang from comment #3)

Done:

https://reviews.freebsd.org/D18497

I hope I did it right. Let me know if I missed something.

Anyway; is this the normal procedure?
If it is, I think we should also update the fdp-primer section of the documentation (https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/fdp-primer/overview.html#overview-quick-start)
